problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
